## Checklist

- [ ] `task lint` passes
- [ ] `task test` passes (and `task test:integration` if behavior touches the database)
- [ ] Generated code is current (`task generate` produces no diff)
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] Docs or ADRs updated if the change affects architecture or behavior
